description_long: This is a modern, two-story house with a flat roof and a clean, geometric design. The exterior features a combination of white and gray walls, accented by wooden panels and large glass windows, creating a sleek and contemporary appearance. The house sits on a rectangular green lawn with a paved driveway leading to the main entrance, which is marked by a prominent overhang and a minimalist pathway. The landscaping includes a few small trees and shrubs, adding a touch of greenery to the otherwise structured environment. The rear and side views reveal additional windows and a private backyard area, suggesting ample natural light and outdoor living space. The overall design emphasizes simplicity, functionality, and integration with the surrounding landscape.
description: A modern, two-story house with a flat roof, large windows, and a mix of white, gray, and wood exterior finishes, set on a landscaped green lawn.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, driveway, and a clear view of the flat roof and large windows.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the house, side windows, and landscaping elements.
description_view_2: Top-down view displaying the flat roof and the overall footprint of the house and lawn.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the rear and side windows, backyard area, and additional landscaping.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Minimalist main entry with a flat overhang, paved steps, and a simple, modern door
